info.description: AI Agent Platform API - Skill marketplace, repository and registry management.
info.title: Costrict Web API

get.description: Get all system notification channels (admin only)

post.description: Create a new system notification channel (admin only)

put.description: Update a system notification channel (admin only)

delete.description: Delete a system notification channel (admin only)

get.description: List members by target system role (platform admin only)
Get system roles of a specified user (platform admin only)

post.description: Grant a system role to a user (platform admin only)

delete.description: Revoke a system role from a user (platform admin only)

post.description: Upload a file artifact for a skill item

delete.description: Delete an artifact by ID and remove its stored file

get.description: Download a file artifact by ID

Exchange OAuth authorization code for access token, set auth cookie, and redirect to frontend. The state parameter carries the redirect target and callback URL encoded as base64url. After successful token exchange, the user is redirected (302) to the URL specified in state, or to the default frontend URL.

parameters.description: Base64url-encoded state containing redirect target and callback URL (format: origin|redirectPath|callbackPath)
parameters.name: state

302.description: Redirect to frontend with auth cookie set

get.description: Redirect to Casdoor OAuth authorization page

parameters.description: Full URL to redirect after login (default: /)
parameters.name: redirect_to

parameters.description: OAuth callback URL on the frontend origin for correct cookie domain
parameters.name: callback_url

post.description: Invalidate current session, revoke token at Casdoor, and clear auth cookie

get.description: Get information of the authenticated user
Get current authenticated user's system roles and capabilities
Get all item categories with i18n names

post.description: Create a new item category with i18n names

get.description: Get a category by ID

delete.description: Delete an item category by ID

post.description: Allocate an available gateway for a device. Requires a valid device Bearer token. Verifies that the token matches the claimed deviceID. If a version is provided and differs from the stored value, the device version is updated.

get.description: Forward an HTTP request to a device via its connected gateway. Requires user authentication (RequireAuth middleware) and verifies that the authenticated user owns the device.

put.description: Forward an HTTP request to a device via its connected gateway. Requires user authentication (RequireAuth middleware) and verifies that the authenticated user owns the device.

post.description: Forward an HTTP request to a device via its connected gateway. Requires user authentication (RequireAuth middleware) and verifies that the authenticated user owns the device.

delete.description: Forward an HTTP request to a device via its connected gateway. Requires user authentication (RequireAuth middleware) and verifies that the authenticated user owns the device.

patch.description: Forward an HTTP request to a device via its connected gateway. Requires user authentication (RequireAuth middleware) and verifies that the authenticated user owns the device.

get.description: Get all devices registered by the authenticated user

post.description: Register a device for the authenticated user

get.description: Get details of a specific device

delete.description: Delete a device registration

post.description: Rotate the authentication token for a device
Notify the server that a device has disconnected from a gateway. Unbinds the device and marks it offline.
Notify the server that a device has connected to a gateway. Binds the device to the gateway and marks it online.
Verify that a device token is valid and matches the claimed deviceID. Used by gateways for internal authentication.
Register a new gateway instance with the server. The gateway receives a heartbeat interval in the response.

delete.description: Remove a gateway instance from the registry.

post.description: Report gateway health and current connection count. Returns the current server epoch for consistency checks.

get.description: List all project invitations for the authenticated user
Get all pending invitations for the current user

delete.description: Cancel a pending invitation as the inviter

post.description: Accept a pending invitation to join a repository
Decline a pending invitation to join a repository
Accept or reject a project invitation as the invitee

get.description: Get all skill items visible to the current user with pagination and author information

parameters.description: Filter to only favorited items (requires auth)
parameters.name: favorited

parameters.description: Sort by createdAt, previewCount, installCount, or favoriteCount
parameters.name: sortBy

parameters.description: Sort order: asc or desc (default: desc)
parameters.name: sortOrder

post.description: Create a skill item via JSON or upload a .zip, .tar.gz, or .tgz archive via multipart/form-data. Auto-selects public registry if registryId is omitted.

get.description: Get all skill items owned by the current authenticated user
Get skill item by ID with registry, versions, artifacts and repo visibility

put.description: Update skill item by ID. Accepts JSON for field updates or multipart/form-data with a .zip, .tar.gz, or .tgz archive. Creates a new version if content changes.

delete.description: Delete skill item by ID

post.description: Analyze an existing skill and get improvement suggestions

get.description: Get all artifacts for a skill item

post.description: Log a user interaction with a capability item
Check whether provided content or md5 matches the current item version or a historical revision.

get.description: Download the Markdown content of a capability item (skill/subagent/command) as a file. Access is determined by the parent repository's visibility.

post.description: Mark an item as favorited for the current user

delete.description: Remove the current user's favorite mark from an item

post.description: Apply suggested improvements to a skill

put.description: Move a capability item to a different registry. Target registry must belong to a non-sync repository. Caller must be the item creator, or owner/admin of the source repo. Caller must be a member of the target repo.

post.description: Manually trigger a security scan for a capability item

get.description: Get paginated scan result history for a capability item
Get current scan status and latest result summary for a capability item
Find items similar to a given item using vector similarity
Get behavior statistics for a specific item

put.description: Transfer a capability item to a different repository. The system will automatically find the target repository's internal registry. Target repository must be a non-sync type. Caller must be the item creator, or owner/admin of the source repo. Caller must be a member of the target repo. When targetRepoId is "public", the item will be transferred to the default public registry; any authenticated user who is the item creator or source repo admin can perform this operation.

get.description: Get all versions of a skill item
Get a specific version of a skill item

post.description: Search using both semantic similarity and keyword matching

get.description: Get recently added high-quality items

post.description: Get personalized skill recommendations using multiple strategies
Search for capability items using semantic similarity

get.description: Get trending items based on recent activity
Get all notification channels configured by the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new notification channel for the authenticated user

get.description: Get all available notification channel types with their config schemas
Get details of a specific notification channel

delete.description: Delete a notification channel

get.description: Get notification sending logs for a specific channel

post.description: Send a test notification to verify channel configuration

get.description: List all projects the authenticated user belongs to

parameters.description: Only return projects pinned by current user
parameters.name: pinned

post.description: Create a new project and add the creator as project admin

get.description: Get project details for a project member

put.description: Update project information as project admin

delete.description: Soft delete a project as project admin

post.description: Archive a project as project admin

put.description: Update archivedAt for an already archived project as project admin

get.description: Get basic project information for a project member
List invitation records for a project as project admin

post.description: Invite a user to join a project as project admin

get.description: List all members of a project for project members

delete.description: Remove a member from a project as project admin

put.description: Update a project member role as project admin
Set personal pin status for a project the authenticated user belongs to

post.description: Unarchive a project as project admin

get.description: Get registries visible to the current user. Visibility is determined by the parent repository's visibility field: public repos' registries are visible to everyone, private repos' registries are visible to repo members, and registries without a repo are visible to their owner.

post.description: Create a new skill registry. Visibility is inherited from the parent repository.

get.description: Get all registries owned by a user
Get the global public skill registry
Get registry by ID with its items

put.description: Update registry by ID. Note: visibility is controlled at the repository level, not the registry level.

delete.description: Delete registry by ID

get.description: Get all items in a registry with author information

parameters.description: Sort by createdAt, previewCount, installCount, or favoriteCount
parameters.name: sortBy

parameters.description: Sort order: asc or desc (default: desc)
parameters.name: sortOrder

post.description: Create a new skill item in a specific registry

put.description: Transfer a registry's ownership to a different repository. Caller must be the registry owner_id or an admin/owner of the current repo, and at least a member of the target repo. Sync registries cannot be transferred while syncing.

get.description: Probe whether a registry requires authentication. Checks the parent repository's visibility. Returns {"public":false} for non-existent repos to avoid leaking repo existence.
Return the index.json for a repo's registry, filtered by the caller's access rights. Access is determined by the parent repository's visibility. Requires Bearer token for non-public repositories.

Download a specific file of an item identified by repo/itemType/slug/filename. For the main content file (e.g. SKILL.md), returns text/plain content directly. For asset files (images, binaries, etc.), streams the file with its original MIME type from storage. Access is determined by the parent repository's visibility.
get.summary: Download registry item file by slug

parameters.description: Filename (e.g. SKILL.md, agent.md, or any asset file)
parameters.name: file

200.description: File content (text or binary depending on file type)

get.description: Get all repositories

post.description: Create a new repository. Set repoType=sync to create a Git-synced repository.

get.description: Get all repositories the current authenticated user belongs to
Get repository by ID

delete.description: Delete repository by ID and all associated resources (registries, items, versions, assets, artifacts)

get.description: Get all invitations for a repository (requires owner or admin role)

post.description: Send an invitation to a user to join the repository (requires owner or admin role)
post.summary: Invite a user to a repository

delete.description: Cancel a pending invitation (requires owner or admin role)

get.description: Get all members of a repository

post.description: Add a user to a repository (requires owner or admin role)

put.description: Update a member's role in a repository (requires owner or admin role)

delete.description: Remove a user from a repository (requires owner or admin role)

get.description: List all capability registries belonging to a repository

post.description: Bind a new Git sync registry to a repository

put.description: Update sync configuration of a registry belonging to a repository

delete.description: Delete a sync registry from a repository

get.description: Get the internal capability registry for a repository

post.description: Manually trigger a sync job for the repository's registry
Cancel a pending scan job

get.description: Get full scan report for a specific scan result

get.summary: List sessions for the current user

post.summary: Decompose a prompt into sub-tasks using LLM (Leader)

post.description: Leader sends explore queries targeting a specific Teammate machine.

get.description: Query daily request activity for all users under the specified git repository URL.

post.description: Receive batched session usage reports from authenticated CLI clients and upsert them with request-level idempotency.

get.description: Query a user's basic information by user ID, including name and avatar URL.
Get a summary of user's behavior and preferences
Given a comma-separated list of user IDs, return a map of id -> displayName. Results are served from an in-memory cache when possible.
Search users by username or email keyword (requires authentication)

post.description: Receive GitHub push events and enqueue sync jobs

get.description: Get all workspaces for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a workspace for the authenticated user with at least one directory

get.description: Get the default workspace for the authenticated user
Get details of a specific workspace including directories

delete.description: Delete a workspace and all its directories

get.description: Get all devices in a workspace with pagination

post.description: Add a new directory to an existing workspace
Reorder directories in a workspace

put.description: Update a directory in a workspace

delete.description: Delete a directory from a workspace

post.description: Set a workspace as the default for the authenticated user
